source.submodule: What is OOPs / Features of OOPs

topicTags: What is OOPs / Features of OOPs

content.problemStatement: Write a class Rectangle with length and breadth as attribute and area and perimeter as methods. Given length and breadth as input, Print area and perimeter of rectangle using area and perimeter methods respectively.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input contains length of rectangle.
- The second line of input contains breadth of rectangle.
content.outputFormat:
- First line contains the output of area method of Rectangle.
- Second line contains the output of perimeter method of Rectangle.
